method: 3 identical requests per config: fixed technical prompt, max_tokens 1024, temperature 0.0, enable_thinking false; wall-clock tok/s from usage.completion_tokens. Config per checkpoint README: method qwen3_5_mtp n=3, --language-model-only, prefix caching off (upstream #43559/#38182/#40756).
external_reference: checkpoint README reports 1.74x on the same GPU class at 256k config; our 1.36x at 262k/2-seq is lower but same direction. Author-reported numbers were not used as measurements.
notes: Bakeoff sweep for this candidate: preflight ALL PASS, context verified at BOTH 131,072 and 262,144 tokens (largest verified window of the exercise), tools 20/20, session pass, intelligence 2/2.
Community checkpoint (ModelOpt NVFP4 with bf16 MTP head preserved); provenance caveat applies as with all community artifacts.
